installCommand: curl -fsSL https://nodejs.org/dist/v22.6.0/node-v22.6.0-linux-x64.tar.xz | tar xzf - && test -f node-v22.6.0-linux-x64/bin/npm && node-v22.6.0-linux-x64/bin/npm i -g pnpm@10.10.0 && test -f node-v22.6.0-linux-x64/bin/pnpm && export PNPM_IGNORE_ENGINES=true && node-v22.6.0-linux-x64/bin/pnpm i
